title: Multipack - Furniture Sliders - 4 Pack - 3.5" 9cm - Wooden Laminate Floor Protector Glider Felt Pads by Love your Wood (3, Felt Furniture Sliders)
features: Effortlessly move heavy furniture on hard flooring
Safeguard wood and laminate from scratches and scuffs
Felt side for smooth gliding on the floor; foam side protects furniture
description: Simplify your furniture-moving tasks with our Furniture Sliders 4Pc set. Crafted to facilitate the smooth relocation of heavy items on hard flooring, these felt pads are a must-have for every home or office. Protect your valuable wood and laminate surfaces from unsightly scratches and scuffs while effortlessly maneuvering your furniture. Each slider measures 9cm (3.5") in diameter and is 1.1cm thick, providing ample coverage and protection. The felt side ensures frictionless movement across the floor, while the foam side gently cushions and shields your furniture from damage. Whether you're rearranging your living space or moving heavy pieces for cleaning purposes, our Furniture Sliders 4Pc set offers convenience and peace of mind. Upgrade your furniture-moving experience today!
